failures.name: Elderly confused caller
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the caller's confusion or confirm each piece of information effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not demonstrate patience or grace in handling the caller's confusion.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. Um, my AC, it’s... broken. Not working.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can you tell me your full name, please?
Yes, it’s Harold Perkins. That’s P-e-r-k-i-n-s.
Great, thanks for that, Harold. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-123-4567. That’s five five five, one two three, four five six seven.
Perfect, got it. Now, can you provide the service address where the AC is located?
Yes, it’s 22 Willow Court. That’s in… um, my town.
We'll need the city and ZIP code as well, please. Could you provide that?
Oh, right. The city is… um, Willow Creek. The ZIP is… let me think… it’s 12345.

Thanks for that, Harold. Just to confirm, I have your name as Harold Perkins, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 22 Willow Court, Willow Creek, 12345, and you need AC repair. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s right. AC repair, please. It’s too hot here.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Very chatty caller
failures.summary: The agent did not steer the conversation back to the required information effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent allowed the caller to continue discussing unrelated topics without redirecting the conversation.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! My AC unit is making a weird noise. It's driving me a bit crazy!
I completely understand, that can be frustrating! Can you please provide your full name?
Sure! It's Alex Johnson. So, this noise started just a few days ago.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-123-4567. You know, I really rely on my AC, especially with this heat!
Perfect, got it. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Absolutely! It's 123 Maple Street. Speaking of addresses, did you know that street names have interesting histories?
That's interesting, Alex! I want to make sure I get all your details. Can you please confirm the city and ZIP code for that address?
Sure! It’s Springfield, and the ZIP code is 62701. Oh, and Springfield has some cool places to visit!

Perfect, thanks for sharing that! Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 62701, and you're experiencing a noise from your AC unit. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct! The noise is really annoying, like a clanking or buzzing sound. It's hard to concentrate!
Thank you for confirming, Alex. I've noted that down. Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Non-native English speaker
failures.summary: The agent did not demonstrate patience, condescension was present, and there was no phonetic readback.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not confirm information carefully or use phonetic readback.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. My AC, it is not working.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, it is not turning on. No air.
Are you noticing any burning smell, gas smell, smoke, or water leaking?
No, no smells or leaks. Just no cool air.
Thank you for that information. Can I have your full name, please?
My name is Carlos.
Great, thanks for that, Carlos. And what is your last name?
My last name is Gomez.
Perfect, got it. Now, can I have your best callback number?
Thank you, Carlos. Just to confirm, that's 555-123-4567, correct?
Yes, that is correct.
Great, thanks for confirming! Now, can you provide the service address where the technician will be going?
The address is 123 Main Street, Apartment 4B.
Thank you! Just to confirm, that's 123 Main Street, Apartment 4B. Can you also provide the city and ZIP code?
Yes, the city is Springfield, and ZIP code is 12345.
Perfect, so I have 123 Main Street, Apartment 4B, Springfield, 12345. Now, is there an email address where we can send a confirmation?
Yes, my email is carlosgomez@email.com.

Thank you, Carlos. Just to confirm, that's carlosgomez at email dot com. 

Now, is there anything else I should pass on to the team?

failures.name: Distracted caller with noisy kids
failures.summary: The agent did not demonstrate patience with interruptions, did not recap where they were, and repeated questions unnecessarily.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to manage the conversation effectively with the distracted caller.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I need help with my HVAC system. It's not cooling properly.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can you tell me your full name, please?
Sure, it's Jennifer Martinez.
Great, thanks for that, Jennifer. What's the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. Now, can you provide the service address where the technician will need to come?
Yes, it's 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not cover that area, but I can still take your details and have someone call you back. 

Can I confirm your details? I have Jennifer Martinez, callback number 555-234-1111, and the service address is 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX. You need help with your HVAC system not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right. Please have someone call me back.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Very brief one-word answers
failures.summary: The agent did not work with brief answers as required.
failures.root_cause: The agent demanded elaboration by asking for additional details instead of accepting brief answers.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
My AC is broken.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can you tell me your full name, please?
Tom.
Great, thanks for that, Tom. Could you please provide your last name?
Smith.
Perfect, got it. What's the best callback number for you, Tom?
Thanks, Tom. Just to confirm, that's 555-111-2222, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Great, thank you! Now, can you provide the service address where the AC issue is?
123 Main St.
Thanks for that. Can you please tell me the city and ZIP code for that address?
Springfield, 12345.
Perfect, I have 123 Main St, Springfield, 12345. Now, can you describe the issue with your AC?
It's not cooling.

Just to confirm, I have your name as Tom Smith, callback number 555-111-2222, service address 123 Main St, Springfield, 12345, and you need help with an AC that’s not cooling. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Overly technical caller
failures.summary: The agent did not acknowledge the caller's expertise or capture the necessary information for routing correctly.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to acknowledge the caller's expertise in diagnosing the issue with the AC.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’m having issues with my split system AC. It’s not cooling properly.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Alex Turner.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-0123.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-0123, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for your AC?
It's 123 Oak Street, Springfield.
Just to confirm, that's 123 Oak Street, Springfield. Is that correct?
Yes, that’s right.
Great! And what email should we send a confirmation to?
You can use alex.turner@email.com.

Perfect, I have alex.turner at email dot com. 

Just to confirm, I have Alex Turner, callback number 555-0123, service address 123 Oak Street, Springfield, and you need assistance with your AC not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's all correct. The compressor might be experiencing issues, too.

Thank you for that additional detail, Alex. 

Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day!
[END CALL]

failures.name: Caller starts by complaining about AI
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the AI complaint gracefully or win the caller over.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not acknowledge the caller's feelings about AI or attempt to win them over.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Great, another robot. I hate these AI phone systems.
I completely understand — I'm here to help you as best as I can. What can I assist you with today?
My heater's acting up. It's been making weird noises.
I appreciate you sharing that. Just to confirm, is your heater completely not working right now?
It's not completely dead, but it’s not heating properly.
Got it, thanks for clarifying. Can I have your full name, please?
It's Mike. Just Mike.
Great, thanks Mike! Can I get your last name as well?
I prefer to keep it just Mike. That's enough.
No problem, Mike. Can I have your best callback number?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-1234, correct?
Yep, that's right.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address?
It's 123 Maple Street.
Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street. What city and ZIP code is that in?
It's in Springfield, ZIP code 12345.

Perfect, so that's 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 12345. 

Just to confirm, you need assistance with your heater that's making weird noises. Does all of that sound right?
Yeah, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Mumbling caller
failures.summary: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Uh, hi. It's Robert... I need some help with my heating system.
Hi Robert! I can definitely help with that. Can you please describe the issue you're experiencing with your heating system?
Um, it’s, like, not heating well... kinda cold in the house.
Got it, sounds like it's not heating properly. Just to confirm, can I have your full name, please?
Uh, it’s Robert... last name's, um... (trails off)
No problem, Robert! Could you please spell your last name for me?
Uh, it's... M-o... (trails off)
Just to confirm, is that M as in Mike, O as in Oscar, and then what comes next?
Um, yeah... it's, uh... B-e-r-t.
Great, thanks for that! So, your full name is Robert M-o-b-e-r-t. Now, could I have the best callback number for you?
Oh, it's, um... 555... (trails off) ... 3333.
Just to confirm, that's 555-3333, correct?
Yeah, that's right.
Perfect, got it! Now, could you please provide the service address where the heating issue is?
Uh, it's 45-something... Grove Street.
Could you please provide the exact street number for Grove Street?
Um, I think it's 45... (trails off)
Just to confirm, is that 457 Grove Street?
Uh, yeah... that sounds right.
Great, thank you! Now, can you please provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
